category_title: Sixth-grade students with LD who doodle and lack orientation to the teacher during math
scenario_title: Independent math work and error monitoring
minimal_context: Chris is working one-on-one with a teacher during after-school homework support to complete his math problem-solving assignment.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's get started on your math homework. Please complete the first problem-solving procedure on the worksheet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Digs through backpack) I can't find my math notebook or my pencil.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is a pencil and some paper. Go ahead and try the first problem.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Draws a picture of a basketball on the corner of the paper) I don't remember how we did this in class today.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Look at the problem again and see what you can figure out.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the paper away) It's too hard and I keep making mistakes. Math is just not my subject.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's get started on your math homework. Please complete the first problem-solving procedure on the worksheet.

STUDENT: (Digs through backpack) I can't find my math notebook or my pencil.

TUTOR: Here is a pencil and some paper. Go ahead and try the first problem.

STUDENT: (Draws a picture of a basketball on the corner of the paper) I don't remember how we did this in class today.

TUTOR: Look at the problem again and see what you can figure out.

STUDENT: (Pushes the paper away) It's too hard and I keep making mistakes. Math is just not my subject.

task.learning_goal: Accurate completion of each step in the problem-solving procedure

context.environment: Voluntary homework support time after school and home room period
context.materials: Math homework, task-specific checklists tailored to mistake patterns, MARS template
context.time_context: After school and later in the day during home room

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When showing poor math test results or specific mistake patterns
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Difficulty managing classroom materials, poor engagement
related_quotes: Math is just not my subject

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Works independently only 50–75% of the time, poor engagement
